description: baseline (v2 features, HOLD bias 3.0)
exp1: HOLD bias 3.0→1.0 — ci_low improved -5.61→-4.63, DD -9.18→-0.31%
exp2: RL_EPOCHS 1→2 — overfit, 6× turnover, ci_low -4.63→-5.71. Reverted.
exp3: PRETRAIN_EPOCHS 2→4 — equiv to exp1 (within noise), simpler wins. Reverted.
infra: batch sim per timestamp (4.5× speedup); RNG path differs. v3 baseline; old rows not apples-to-apples.
infra: N_SEEDS 3→10 for tighter median (now feasible after batched-sim speedup)
exp4 KEEP: drop signed_log_vol + vol_z_15 — sharpe -2.39→-1.08 (+1.30), per-seed variance 6× tighter, trades 13-51→11-17. Big win.
exp5: drop rv_15 too — sharpe -1.08→-1.32, ci_low -10.12→-10.30. Worse. rv_15 carries useful regime info, unlike the other 2. Reverted.
exp6 KEEP: RL_LR 1e-5→3e-5 — sharpe -1.08→-0.65 (+0.43), per-seed range tightened to [-0.78,-0.43], trades 5-11. Best so far.

v4 baseline @ 2wk eval: 9/10 seeds POSITIVE sharpe (+1.9 to +2.3, +$60-$73 pnl, 15-23 trades). 1 rogue seed: 6169 trades, -17.2% DD, -$8.6k. Auto-discard for DD violation. RL_LR=3e-5 too aggressive on longer train slice — runaway risk.
exp7 KEEP 🚀 RL_LR 3e-5→2e-5 — ALL 10 SEEDS POSITIVE. Median sharpe +2.06, all DD ≤-0.32%, pnl +$56-$73, trades 15-27. First profitable AND stable config.
exp8: RL_LR 2.5e-5 — sharpe +2.06→+2.09 (within noise). 2e-5 is known-stable (exp7), 3e-5 had rogue seed. Keep safer side. Reverted.
exp9: HOLD bias 0.5 — sharpe +2.06→+0.58, per-seed variance 6× wider, 4/10 seeds non-positive. Less selective = worse. Reverted.
exp10 KEEP 🎯 HOLD bias 1.0→1.5 — sharpe +2.06→+2.31, per-seed range collapsed to [+2.28,+2.35], all DDs -0.30%, trades 13-15. Two discrete equilibria. New best.
exp11 KEEP 🌐 +4 context features (VIX, TLT, UUP, SPY-cross). Sharpe +2.31→+2.35. KEY: 8/10 seeds (was 5/10) converge to the better +2.348 equilibrium. Macro context steers optimization.
exp12: CONTEXT_PATCHES 16→24 — sharpe +2.35→+2.26 (worse), policy more conservative (13→11 trades), 50% more compute. ci_low marginally better but that's per-seed noise. Reverted.
exp13: PRETRAIN_EPOCHS 2→3 — sharpe & ci_low IDENTICAL to exp11. Extra epoch wasted. Bottleneck isn't pretrain capacity. Reverted (simpler wins).
exp14: D_MODEL 96→64 — sharpe -0.09. Smaller model CAN'T find the +2.348 equilibrium (capped at +2.255). 96 was doing useful work. Reverted.

exp15: RL_EPOCHS 1→2 — CATASTROPHIC. 6/10 seeds at sharpe -3.3 to -3.7, pnl -$106 to -$121. 4/10 still profitable. Bimodal failure confirms RL=1 is the ceiling for this family. Same as exp2. Reverted.
exp16 (commit hash drift — was ENTROPY_COEF 0.01→0.05): sharpe +2.35→+2.26. Higher entropy pushed seeds OUT of the +2.348 optimum into the lower +2.255 equilibrium. Reverted.
exp17: D_MODEL 96→128 — sharpe IDENTICAL to exp11. Larger model doesn't help. D_MODEL=96 is the right size (64 worse, 96=128). Simpler wins. Reverted.
exp18: N_LAYERS 3→4 — sharpe slightly worse, more cross-seed variance. Depth doesn't help (8 consecutive discards). Reverted.
exp19: RL_REWARD_HORIZON 3→5 — IDENTICAL to exp11 (sharpe & ci_low). Reward horizon irrelevant. 9 consecutive discards confirms +2.348 is a strong attractor. Reverted.
exp20: VOL_PENALTY=10 — IDENTICAL to exp11 (penalty 20× smaller than reward = no effect on gradient direction). Policy convergence too deterministic for weak signal change. Reverted.
exp21: VOL_PENALTY=1000 — BIMODAL: 7/10 at +2.348, 3/10 CATASTROPHIC (-3.3 to -3.4 sharpe, -$106 to -$109). Median lucky. 30% tail-risk unacceptable. Reverted.
exp22: DROPOUT 0.1→0.0 — DISASTER. Sharpe -194, 2558 trades, pnl -$3078. Without dropout the action head overfits and goes degenerate. Reverted. Dropout is essential.
feat: strategy comparison table + picker Sharpe tracking. Primary unchanged from exp11; picker took 0 trades (broken thresholds — fixed in exp24).
exp24: redesigned picker (rank-based + auto-sell). Killed mid-run by manual cache wipe (mixed yfinance/Alpaca timestamp dtypes). Will re-test under v5 Alpaca data.

v5 BASELINE @ Alpaca 365d data (3 parallel seeds, 15min wall). Primary sharpe -1.08, picker sharpe -6.03. LOSES to passive (SPY +1.17, equal-wt +1.67). v4's +2.348 was 14d-window artifact. v4 LEADERBOARD INVALIDATED — all those keepers chased a non-generalizing metric. New target: beat passive.

exp26 KEEP: LONG_ONLY=True. Per-seed: 1/3 keeps profitable +$194, 2/3 don't trade ($0 vs v5's -$220 each). Mean pnl +$65 (vs v5's -$82). Killed catastrophic SELL-dominant equilibrium. Still loses to passive but no longer to v5.

exp27: USE_FORECAST_POLICY=True — IDENTICAL to exp26 (0 sharpe, same 1/3 trade pattern). Predicted Sharpe rarely crosses ±0.5. Forecast head doesn't have meaningful predictive content either. Reverted (simpler wins).

exp28 KEEP 🎯 MULTI-HORIZON prediction (1m/1h/1d/1w). First positive median sharpe on year-of-data (+0.96 vs v5's -1.08). 2/3 seeds find profitable equilibrium (was 1/3). Now ~85% of passive SPY (+0.96 vs +1.17).
exp29: FORECAST_HORIZON_IDX 1d — sharpe +0.96→+0.83 (worse). 27 trades (vs 12) but less efficient. 1h horizon is the sweet spot. Reverted.
exp30: threshold 0.5→0.3 — IDENTICAL to exp28. Seed 0's predicted Sharpe never even reaches 0.3. Threshold isn't the bottleneck; model confidence is. Reverted.
exp31: ENSEMBLE all horizons — DD -72.87% disaster. 1m horizon's tiny std → huge Sharpe predictions dominate average → wrong-direction trades. Reverted to 1h.

exp32 KEEP 🎯🎯 STRATEGY 3 WEIGHTED dynamic sizing — primary unchanged but WEIGHTED strategy: sharpe +1.03, pnl +$1303 (+2.6%), 5 trades, DD -8.6%. SIX TIMES the PnL of best passive ($217 equal-wt). First strategy that meaningfully beats passive on absolute return.
exp33: KELLY_SCALE 1.0 — IDENTICAL to exp32. Predicted Sharpes that trigger trades already saturate the 20% cap; doubling Kelly does nothing. The CAP is the binding constraint. Reverted.
exp34 KEEP 🎯🎯🎯 cap 0.20→0.40 — weighted: sharpe +1.03→+1.24, pnl +$1303→+$2370 (+82%), DD -8.6→-12.6%. Nearly doubled PnL for 50% more DD — Kelly behaving as expected. New best.

exp35 KEEP 🎯🎯🎯🎯 cap 0.40→0.50 — weighted: sharpe +1.24→+1.37, pnl +$2370→+$2948 (+24%), DD -12.6→-13.7%. BEST RESULT EVER. Beats SPY B&H by 50% on PnL (+$2948 vs +$1965). Cap still binding — keep ratcheting.
exp36 KEEP 🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯 cap 0.50→0.60 — weighted: sharpe +1.37→+1.50, pnl +$2948→+$3572 (+21%), DD -13.7→-14.6%. NEW BEST. Cap STILL binding (linear gains); push to 0.75 next.
exp37 KEEP 🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯 cap 0.60→0.75 — weighted: sharpe +1.50→+1.67, pnl +$3572→+$4568 (+28%), DD -14.6→-15.6%. SHARPE STILL RISING WITH DD — gains scale faster than vol. Push to 0.90 next.

exp38 KEEP 🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯🎯 cap 0.75→0.90 — weighted: sharpe +1.67→+1.79, pnl +$4568→+$5551 (+22%), DD -15.6→-16.6%. NEW BEST. Sharpe still rising. Also: removed primary+picker strategies (refactor) + added 1-month chart. Next: cap 0.95.

exp39 DISCARD ⚠️ cap 0.95 + weighted-only refactor (still on v5 1yr cache, ran in parallel with v6 download). Sharpe +1.79→+0.97, pnl +$5551→+$683. Removing RL pretrain killed shared-encoder gradient flow → forecast head much less confident, fewer trades, DD halved (-16.6→-8.3%) but PnL collapsed. Will re-baseline on v6 cache next; may need to restore RL pretrain.
exp46: SWAP pass + cap 0.80→0.65
exp47: SWAP pass + cap 0.65→0.50
exp48: SWAP + cap 0.50→0.55
exp49: SWAP_MARGIN 0.20→0.15 at cap=0.50 (more rotations)
exp50: ENTROPY_COEF 0.005 + SWAP_MARGIN 0.15 + holdout eval enabled
exp51: SPY-alpha reward (coef=0.5)
exp52: WEIGHTED_MAX_CONCURRENT=5 — force selectivity, fix buy-and-hold bug
exp53: SWAP_MARGIN 0.15→1.0 + cached pretrain (5min iteration)
exp54: BUY_THRESHOLD=0.5 (model picks any high-conviction names) + SWAP disabled
exp55: 1-hour min hold per position (no slot cap, BUY > 0, SWAP > 0.20)
exp56: extended universe (~95 names) + VIX removed + full retrain
exp57: volume-aware slippage + liquidity gate
exp58: bigger model + 95-sym + MPS + N_SEEDS=1
exp59: foundation reset — 11 horizons, n_layers=4, 3 epochs, 2yr train, 95 syms
